statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from "posts" where exists (select * from "post_embeddings" where "posts"."id" = "post_embeddings"."post_id")

explain.query: select count(*) as aggregate from "posts" where exists (select * from "post_embeddings" where "posts"."id" = "post_embeddings"."post_id")

statements.sql: select "posts".*, (select count(*) from "likes" where "posts"."id" = "likes"."post_id") as "likes_count", (select count(*) from "comments" where "posts"."id" = "comments"."post_id") as "comments_count" from "posts" inner join "post_embeddings" on "post_embeddings"."post_id" = "posts"."id" order by "posts"."created_at" desc, "posts"."id" desc limit 10

explain.query: select "posts".*, (select count(*) from "likes" where "posts"."id" = "likes"."post_id") as "likes_count", (select count(*) from "comments" where "posts"."id" = "comments"."post_id") as "comments_count" from "posts" inner join "post_embeddings" on "post_embeddings"."post_id" = "posts"."id" order by "posts"."created_at" desc, "posts"."id" desc limit 10
